translations.text: and Shaaraim, and Adithaim, and Gederah, and Gederothaim: fourteen cities and their hamlets.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Zenan, and Hadashah, and Migdal-Gad,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Dilean, and Mizpeh, and Joktheel,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Lachish, and Bozkath, and Eglon,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Cabbon, and Lahmas, and Chithlish,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Gederoth, Beth-Dagon, and Naamah, and Makkedah: sixteen cities and their hamlets.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Libna, and Ether, and Ashan,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Jiphthah, and Ashnah, and Nezib,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Keilah, and Achzib, and Mareshah: nine cities and their hamlets.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Ekron and its dependent villages and its hamlets.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: From Ekron and westward all that are by the side of Ashdod, and their hamlets.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Ashdod, its dependent villages and its hamlets; Gazah, its dependent villages and its hamlets, as far as the torrent of Egypt, and the great sea and [its] coast.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: — And in the hill-country: Shamir, and Jattir, and Sochoh,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Dannah, and Kirjath-sannah, that is, Debir,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Anab, and Eshtemoh, and Anim,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Goshen, and Holon, and Giloh: eleven cities and their hamlets.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Arab, and Dumah, and Eshan,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Janum, and Beth-Tappuah, and Aphekah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Humtah, and Kirjath-Arba, that is, Hebron, and Zior: nine cities and their hamlets.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Maon, Carmel, and Ziph, and Jutah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Jizreel, and Jokdeam, and Zanoah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Kain, Gibeah and Timnah: ten cities and their hamlets.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Halhul, Beth-Zur, and Gedor,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Maarath, and Beth-anoth, and Eltekon: six cities and their hamlets.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Kirjath-Baal, that is, Kirjath-jearim, and Rabbah: two cities and their hamlets.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: — In the wilderness: Beth-Arabah, Middin, and Secacah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Nibshan, and Ir-Hammelah, and En-gedi: six cities and their hamlets.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But as for the Jebusites, the inhabitants of Jerusalem, the children of Judah could not dispossess them; and the Jebusites dwell with the children of Judah at Jerusalem to this day.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the lot came forth for the children of Joseph from the Jordan of Jericho as far as the waters of Jericho eastwards, to the wilderness which goes up from Jericho to the hill-country of Bethel.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And [the border] went from Bethel to Luz, and passed to the border of the Archites to Ataroth,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and went down westward to the border of the Japhletites, as far as the border of the lower Beth-horon, and to Gezer; and ended at the sea.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the children of Joseph, Manasseh and Ephraim, took their inheritance.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the border of the children of Ephraim was according to their families; the border of their inheritance eastwards was Ataroth-Addar as far as the upper Beth-horon;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and the border went forth westwards to Micmethath on the north; and the border turned eastwards to Taanath-Shiloh, and passed by it eastwards to Janohah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and went down from Janohah to Ataroth and Naarath, and touched upon Jericho, and went out to the Jordan.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: From Tappuah the border went westwards to the torrent Kanah, and ended at the sea. This is the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Ephraim according to their families,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: with the cities that were set apart for the children of Ephraim in the midst of the inheritance of the children of Manasseh, all the cities and their hamlets.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But they did not dispossess the Canaanites that dwelt at Gezer; and the Canaanites dwell in the midst of Ephraim to this day, and serve under tribute.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the lot came to the tribe of Manasseh (for he was the firstborn of Joseph), to Machir, the firstborn of Manasseh, the father of Gilead, for he was a man of war, and he had Gilead and Bashan.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: There was also [a portion] for the rest of the children of Manasseh according to their families: for the children of Abiezer, and for the children of Helek, and for the children of Asriel, and for the children of Shechem, and for the children of Hepher, and for the children of Shemida: these are the children of Manasseh, the son of Joseph, the males, according to their families.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Zelophehad, the son of Hepher, the son of Gilead, the son of Machir, the son of Manasseh, had no sons, but daughters; and these are the names of his daughters: Mahlah, and Noah, Hoglah, Milcah, and Tirzah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they came near before Eleazar the priest, and before Joshua the son of Nun, and before the princes, saying, Jehovah commanded Moses to give us an inheritance among our brethren. And he gave them according to the commandment of Jehovah an inheritance among the brethren of their father.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And there fell ten portions to Manasseh, besides the land of Gilead and Bashan, which are beyond the Jordan.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For the daughters of Manasseh received an inheritance among his sons; and the rest of Manasseh's sons had the land of Gilead.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the territory of Manasseh was from Asher to Micmethath, which is before Shechem, and the border went on the right hand toward the inhabitants of En-Tappuah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Manasseh had the land of Tappuah; but Tappuah on the border of Manasseh belonged to the children of Ephraim.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the border descended to the torrent Kanah, south of the torrent. These cities were Ephraim's among the cities of Manasseh. And the territory of Manasseh was on the north side of the torrent, and ended at the sea.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Southward it was Ephraim's, and northward it was Manasseh's, and the sea was his border. And they touched upon Asher on the north, and upon Issachar on the east.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Manasseh had in Issachar and in Asher, Beth-shean and its dependent villages, and Ibleam and its dependent villages, and the inhabitants of Dor and its dependent villages, and the inhabitants of En-Dor and its dependent villages, and the inhabitants of Taanach and its dependent villages, and the inhabitants of Megiddo and its dependent villages, the three hilly regions.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But the children of Manasseh could not dispossess [the inhabitants of] those cities; and the Canaanites would dwell in that land.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And it came to pass when the children of Israel were become strong, that they made the Canaanites tributary; but they did not utterly dispossess them.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the children of Joseph spoke to Joshua, saying, Why hast thou given me as inheritance one lot and one portion, seeing I am a great people, forasmuch as Jehovah has blessed me hitherto?

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Joshua said unto them, If thou art a great people, then get thee up to the wood, and cut down for thyself there in the land of the Perizzites and of the giants, if the hill-country of Ephraim is too narrow for thee.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the children of Joseph said, The hill-country will not be enough for us; and all the Canaanites that dwell in the land of the valley have chariots of iron, those that are of Beth-shean and its dependent villages, and those that are in the valley of Jizreel.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Joshua spoke to the house of Joseph, to Ephraim and to Manasseh, saying, Thou art a great people, and hast great power: thou shalt not have one lot only,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: but the hill-country shall be thine, as it is a wood, thou shalt cut it down, and its outgoings shall be thine; for thou shalt dispossess the Canaanites, though they have iron chariots; for they are powerful.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the whole assembly of the children of Israel gathered together at Shiloh, and set up the tent of meeting there; and the land was subdued before them.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And there remained among the children of Israel seven tribes whose inheritance had not been distributed to them.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Joshua said to the children of Israel, How long will ye shew yourselves slack to go to take possession of the land which Jehovah theGod of your fathers hath given you?

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Provide you three men for a tribe; that I may send them, and they shall rise and go through the land, and describe it according to the proportion of their inheritance, and they shall come to me.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they shall divide it into seven portions. Judah shall remain in their border on the south, and the house of Joseph shall remain in their border on the north;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and ye shall describe the land into seven portions, and bring [the description] hither to me, and I will cast lots for you here before Jehovah ourGod.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But the Levites have no portion among you, for the priesthood of Jehovah is their inheritance. And Gad, and Reuben, and half the tribe of Manasseh have received their inheritance beyond the Jordan on the east, which Moses the servant of Jehovah gave them.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the men arose and went away. And Joshua charged them that went to describe the land, saying, Go and walk through the land, and describe it, and come again to me, and I will cast lots for you here before Jehovah in Shiloh.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the men went and passed through the land, and described it by cities into seven portions, in a book, and they came to Joshua, to the camp at Shiloh.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Joshua cast lots for them in Shiloh before Jehovah. And there Joshua divided the land to the children of Israel according to their divisions.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the lot of the tribe of the children of Benjamin came up according to their families. And the territory of their lot came forth between the children of Judah and the children of Joseph.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And their border on the north side was from the Jordan; and the border went up to the side of Jericho on the north, and went up to the mountain westward; and ended at the wilderness of Beth-Aven;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and the border passed on from thence toward Luz, to the south side of Luz, which is Bethel: and the border went down to Ataroth-Addar, near the hill that is on the south of the lower Beth-horon.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: — And the border reached along and turned on the west side, southward from the hill that is before Beth-horon southward; and ended at Kirjath-Baal, which is Kirjath-jearim, a city of the children of Judah: this is the west side.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: — And the south side was from the extreme end of Kirjath-jearim, and the border went out on the west, and went out to the spring of the waters of Nephtoah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the border went down to the end of the mountain that is before the valley of the son of Hinnom, which is in the valley of Rephaim on the north, and went down the valley of Hinnom, to the side of the Jebusite on the south, and went down to En-rogel;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and it reached along on the north, and went forth to En-shemesh, and went forth towards Geliloth, which is opposite to the ascent of Adummim, and went down to the stone of Bohan, the son of Reuben,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and passed along towards the side opposite to Arabah northwards, and went down to Arabah;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and the border passed on to the side of Beth-hoglah on the north, and the border ended at the tongue of the salt sea northward, at the south end of the Jordan: this is the southern border.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: — And the Jordan borders it on the east side. — This was the inheritance of the children of Benjamin, according to its borders round about, according to their families.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the cities of the tribe of the children of Benjamin according to their families were: Jericho, and Beth-hoglah, and Emek-Keziz,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Beth-Arabah, and Zemaraim, and Bethel,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Avvim, and Parah, and Ophrah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Chephar-haammonai, and Ophni, and Geba: twelve cities and their hamlets;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Gibeon, and Ramah, and Beeroth,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Mizpeh, and Chephirah, and Mozah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Rekem, and Jirpeel, and Tharalah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Zelah, Eleph, and Jebusi, that is, Jerusalem, Gibeah, Kirjath: fourteen cities and their hamlets. This was the inheritance of the children of Benjamin according to their families.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the second lot came forth to Simeon, for the tribe of the children of Simeon according to their families; and their inheritance was within the inheritance of the children of Judah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they had in their inheritance Beer-sheba, and Sheba, and Moladah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Hazar-Shual, and Balah, and Ezem,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Eltolad, and Bethul, and Hormah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Ziklag, and Beth-marcaboth, and Hazar-susah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Beth-lebaoth, and Sharuhen: thirteen cities and their hamlets;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Ain, Rimmon, and Ether, and Ashan: four cities and their hamlets;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and all the hamlets that are round these cities to Baalath-beer, [that is] Ramah of the south. This is the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Simeon according to their families.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Out of the lot of the children of Judah was the inheritance of the children of Simeon; for the portion of the children of Judah was too great for them, and the children of Simeon inherited within their inheritance.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the third lot came up for the children of Zebulun according to their families. And the border of their inheritance was unto Sarid;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and their border went up westwards, and [to] Marealah, and reached to Dabbesheth, and reached to the torrent that is before Jokneam;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and turned from Sarid eastward, toward the sun-rising, to the border of Chisloth-Tabor, and went out to Dabrath, and went up to Japhia;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and from thence it passed eastward toward the sun-rising to Gath-Hepher, to Eth-kazin, and went out to Rimmon which reaches to Neah;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and the border turned round it northwards to Hannathon: and ended in the valley of Jiphthah-el; ...

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Kattath, and Nahalal, and Shimron, and Jidalah, and Beth-lehem: twelve cities and their hamlets.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: This was the inheritance of the children of Zebulun according to their families, these cities and their hamlets.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The fourth lot came forth to Issachar, for the children of Issachar according to their families.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And their territory was toward Jizreel, and Chesulloth, and Shunem,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Hapharaim, and Shion, and Anaharath,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Rabbith, and Kishion, and Ebez,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Remeth, and En-gannim, and En-haddah, and Beth-pazzez;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and the border reached to Tabor, and Shahazimah, and Beth-shemesh; and their border ended at the Jordan: sixteen cities and their hamlets.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: This was the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Issachar according to their families, the cities and their hamlets.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the fifth lot came forth for the tribe of the children of Asher according to their families.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And their territory was Helkath, and Hali, and Beten, and Acshaph,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Allammelech, and Amead, and Mishal; and [the border] reached to Carmel westwards, and to Shihor-libnath,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and turned towards the sun-rising to Beth-Dagon, and reached to Zebulun, and to the valley of Jiphthah-el northward [to] Beth-emek and Neiel, and went out to Cabul on the left,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Ebron, and Rehob, and Hammon, and Kanah, as far as great Zidon;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and the border turned to Ramah, and as far as the fortified city of Tyre; and the border turned to Hosah; and ended at the sea by the tract of country of Achzib;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Ummah, and Aphek, and Rehob: twenty-two cities and their hamlets.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: This was the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Asher according to their families, these cities and their hamlets.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sixth lot came forth to the children of Naphtali, for the children of Naphtali according to their families.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And their border was from Heleph, from the oak of Zaanannim; and Adami-nekeb and Jabneel to Lakkum; and ended at the Jordan;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and the border turned westwards to Aznoth-Tabor, and went out from thence to Hukkok, and reached to Zebulun on the south, and reached to Asher on the west, and to Judah upon Jordan towards the sun-rising.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the fortified cities were Ziddim, Zer, and Hammath, Rakkath, and Chinnereth,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Adamah, and Ramah, and Hazor,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Kedesh, and Edrei, and En-Hazor,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Jiron, and Migdal-el, Horem, and Beth-anath, and Beth-shemesh: nineteen cities and their hamlets.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: This was the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Naphtali according to their families, the cities and their hamlets.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The seventh lot came forth for the tribe of the children of Dan according to their families.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the territory of their inheritance was Zoreah, and Eshtaol, and Ir-shemesh,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Shaalabbin, and Ajalon, and Jithlah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Elon, and Timnathah, and Ekron,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and El-tekeh, and Gibbethon, and Baalath,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Jehud, and Beneberak, and Gath-Rimmon,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Me-jarkon, and Rakkon, with the border over against Japho.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the border of the children of Dan ended with these; and the children of Dan went up and fought against Leshem, and took it, and smote it with the edge of the sword, and took possession of it, and dwelt in it, and called Leshem, Dan, after the name of Dan their father.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: This was the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Dan according to their families, these cities and their hamlets.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they ended dividing the land for inheritance according to its borders. And the children of Israel gave an inheritance to Joshua the son of Nun among them.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: According to the word of Jehovah they gave him the city that he asked, Timnath-serah in the hill-country of Ephraim; and he built the city, and dwelt in it.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These were the inheritances, which Eleazar the priest, and Joshua the son of Nun, and the chief fathers of the tribes of the children of Israel, distributed by lot in Shiloh before Jehovah, at the entrance of the tent of meeting. And they ended dividing the land.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Jehovah spoke to Joshua, saying,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Speak to the children of Israel, saying, Appoint for yourselves the cities of refuge, whereof I spoke unto you through Moses,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: that the slayer who unwittingly without intent smiteth any one mortally may flee thither: and they shall be your refuge from the avenger of blood.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And he shall flee unto one of those cities and stand at the entrance of the city-gate, and shall declare his matter in the ears of the elders of that city; and they shall take him into the city unto them, and give him a place, that he may dwell among them.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And if the avenger of blood pursue after him, they shall not deliver the slayer up into his hand; for he smote his neighbour unwittingly, and hated him not previously.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And he shall dwell in that city, until he have stood before the assembly in judgment, until the death of the high-priest that shall be in those days; then shall the slayer return, and come unto his own city, and unto his own house, unto the city from whence he fled.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they hallowed Kedesh in Galilee in the hill-country of Naphtali, and Shechem in the hill-country of Ephraim, and Kirjath-Arba, that is, Hebron, in the hill-country of Judah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And beyond the Jordan from Jericho eastward, they assigned Bezer in the wilderness, in the plateau, out of the tribe of Reuben, and Ramoth in Gilead out of the tribe of Gad, and Golan in Bashan of the tribe of Manasseh.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These were the cities appointed for all the children of Israel, and for the stranger that sojourneth among them, that whosoever smiteth any one mortally without intent might flee thither, and not die by the hand of the avenger of blood, until he stood before the assembly.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Then the chief fathers of the Levites drew near to Eleazar the priest, and to Joshua the son of Nun, and to the chief fathers of the tribes of the children of Israel;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and they spoke to them at Shiloh in the land of Canaan, saying, Jehovah commanded through Moses to give us cities to dwell in, and their suburbs for our cattle.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the children of Israel gave to the Levites out of their inheritance, according to the word of Jehovah, these cities and their suburbs.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the lot came forth for the families of the Kohathites. And the children of Aaron the priest, of the Levites, had by lot out of the tribe of Judah, and out of the tribe of the Simeonites, and out of the tribe of Benjamin, thirteen cities.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the children of Kohath that remained had by lot out of the families of the tribe of Ephraim, and out of the tribe of Dan, and out of the half tribe of Manasseh, ten cities.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the children of Gershon had by lot out of the families of the tribe of Issachar, and out of the tribe of Asher, and out of the tribe of Naphtali, and out of the half tribe of Manasseh in Bashan, thirteen cities.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The children of Merari according to their families had by lot out of the tribe of Reuben, and out of the tribe of Gad, and out of the tribe of Zebulun, twelve cities.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the children of Israel gave by lot to the Levites these cities and their suburbs, as Jehovah commanded through Moses.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they gave out of the tribe of the children of Judah, and out of the tribe of the children of Simeon, these cities which were mentioned by name,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and which the children of Aaron, of the families of the Kohathites, of the children of Levi had (for theirs was the first lot);

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and they gave them Kirjath-Arba, [which Arba was] the father of Anak, that is, Hebron, in the mountain of Judah, with its suburbs round about it.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But the fields of the city and the hamlets thereof gave they to Caleb the son of Jephunneh for his possession.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they gave to the children of Aaron the priest the city of refuge for the slayer, Hebron and its suburbs; and Libnah and its suburbs,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Jattir and its suburbs, and Eshtemoa and its suburbs,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Holon and its suburbs, and Debir and its suburbs,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Ain and its suburbs, and Juttah and its suburbs, [and] Beth-shemesh and its suburbs: nine cities out of those two tribes;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and out of the tribe of Benjamin: Gibeon and its suburbs, Geba and its suburbs,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Anathoth and its suburbs, and Almon and its suburbs; four cities.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: All the cities of the children of Aaron, the priests, were thirteen cities and their suburbs.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And to the families of the children of Kohath, the Levites that remained of the children of Kohath, [they gave cities]. And the cities of their lot were out of the tribe of Ephraim,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and they gave them the city of refuge for the slayer, Shechem and its suburbs in mount Ephraim; and Gezer and its suburbs,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Kibzaim and its suburbs, and Beth-horon and its suburbs: four cities;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and out of the tribe of Dan, Eltekeh and its suburbs, Gibbethon and its suburbs,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Ajalon and its suburbs, Gath-Rimmon and its suburbs: four cities;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and out of half the tribe of Manasseh, Taanach and its suburbs and Gath-Rimmon and its suburbs: two cities.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: All the cities were ten and their suburbs, for the families of the children of Kohath that remained.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And to the children of Gershon, of the families of the Levites, out of half the tribe of Manasseh, [they gave] the city of refuge for the slayer, Golan in Bashan and its suburbs; and Beeshterah and its suburbs: two cities;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and out of the tribe of Issachar, Kishion and its suburbs, Dabrath and its suburbs,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jarmuth and its suburbs, En-gannim and its suburbs: four cities;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and out of the tribe of Asher, Mishal and its suburbs, Abdon and its suburbs,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Helkath and its suburbs, and Rehob and its suburbs: four cities;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and out of the tribe of Naphtali, the city of refuge for the slayer, Kedesh in Galilee, and its suburbs; and Hammoth-Dor and its suburbs, and Kartan and its suburbs: three cities.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: All the cities of the Gershonites according to their families were thirteen cities and their suburbs.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And to the families of the children of Merari, that remained of the Levites, [they gave] out of the tribe of Zebulun, Jokneam and its suburbs, Kartah and its suburbs,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Dimnah and its suburbs, Nahalal and its suburbs: four cities;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and out of the tribe of Reuben, Bezer and its suburbs, and Jahzah and its suburbs,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Kedemoth and its suburbs, and Mephaath and its suburbs: four cities;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and out of the tribe of Gad, the city of refuge for the slayer, Ramoth in Gilead and its suburbs; and Mahanaim and its suburbs,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Heshbon and its suburbs, Jaazer and its suburbs: four cities in all.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: [These were] all the cities of the children of Merari according to their families, which remained of the families of the Levites, and their lot was twelve cities.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: All the cities of the Levites within the possession of the children of Israel were forty-eight cities and their suburbs.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Each one of these cities had its suburbs round about it: thus were all these cities.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Jehovah gave to Israel all the land which he swore to give unto their fathers; and they took possession of it, and dwelt in it.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Jehovah gave them rest round about, according to all that he had sworn unto their fathers; and there stood not a man of all their enemies before them: Jehovah gave all their enemies into their hand.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: There failed nothing of all the good things that Jehovah had spoken to the house of Israel: all came to pass.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Then Joshua called the Reubenites, and the Gadites, and the half tribe of Manasseh,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and said unto them, Ye have kept all that Moses the servant of Jehovah commanded you, and have hearkened to my voice in all that I commanded you.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Ye have not left your brethren these many days unto this day, and ye have kept the charge of the commandment of Jehovah yourGod.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And now Jehovah yourGod hath given rest to your brethren, as he said unto them; and now return, and get you unto your tents, unto the land of your possession, which Moses the servant of Jehovah gave you beyond the Jordan.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Only, take great heed to do the commandment and the law, which Moses the servant of Jehovah commanded you, to love Jehovah yourGod, and to walk in all his ways, and to keep his commandments, and to cleave unto him, and to serve him with all your heart and with all your soul.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Joshua blessed them, and sent them away; and they went to their tents.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And to half the tribe of Manasseh Moses had given [inheritance] in Bashan, and to the other half thereof had Joshua given among their brethren on this side the Jordan westward. And when Joshua sent them away to their tents, he blessed them also,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and spoke to them, saying, Return unto your tents with much wealth and with very much cattle, with silver, and with gold, and with copper, and with iron, and with clothing, in very great quantity; divide the spoil of your enemies with your brethren.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the children of Reuben and the children of Gad and the half tribe of Manasseh returned, and departed from the children of Israel out of Shiloh, which is in the land of Canaan, to go to the country of Gilead, into the land of their possession, of which they had become possessed, according to the word of Jehovah through Moses.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they came to the districts of the Jordan that are in the land of Canaan; and the children of Reuben and the children of Gad and the half tribe of Manasseh built there an altar by the Jordan, an altar of grand appearance.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the children of Israel heard say, Behold, the children of Reuben and the children of Gad and the half tribe of Manasseh have built an altar over against the land of Canaan, in the districts of the Jordan, separately from the children of Israel.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And when the children of Israel heard [of it], the whole assembly of the children of Israel gathered together at Shiloh, to go up against them to war.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the children of Israel sent to the children of Reuben, and to the children of Gad, and to the half tribe of Manasseh, into the land of Gilead, Phinehas the son of Eleazar the priest,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and with him ten princes, of each father's house a prince, out of all the tribes of Israel; and each of them was head of a father's house, of the thousands of Israel.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they came to the children of Reuben, and to the children of Gad, and to the half tribe of Manasseh, to the land of Gilead, and spoke with them, saying,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Thus saith the whole assembly of Jehovah: What wickedness is this which ye have committed against theGod of Israel, to turn away this day from following Jehovah, in that ye have built yourselves an altar, rebelling this day against Jehovah?

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Is the iniquity of Peor too little for us? from which we are not cleansed until this day, although there was a plague in the assembly of Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And ye turn away this day from following Jehovah; and it will be, that since ye rebel this day against Jehovah, to-morrow he will be wroth with the whole assembly of Israel.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Notwithstanding, if the land of your possession is unclean, come over into the land of the possession of Jehovah, where Jehovah's tabernacle dwelleth, and take possession amongst us; but rebel not against Jehovah, and rebel not against us, in building for yourselves an altar besides the altar of Jehovah ourGod.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Did not Achan the son of Zerah commit a trespass in the accursed thing? and wrath fell on all the assembly of Israel, and he perished not alone in his iniquity.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the children of Reuben and the children of Gad and the half tribe of Manasseh answered and said to the heads of the thousands of Israel,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: TheGod ofgods, Jehovah, theGod ofgods, Jehovah, he knoweth, and Israel he shall know [it]; if it is in rebellion, or if in trespass against Jehovah, — save us not this day!

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: — that we have built for ourselves an altar to turn from following Jehovah, and if it is to offer up burnt-offering and oblation on it, and if to offer peace-offerings thereon, let Jehovah himself require it [from us];

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and if we have not done it from fear of this thing, saying, In future your children will speak to our children, saying, What have ye to do with Jehovah theGod of Israel?

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah hath made the Jordan a border between us and you, ye children of Reuben and children of Gad, ye have no portion in Jehovah! And so shall your children make our children cease from fearing Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And we said, Let us now set to work to build an altar, not for burnt-offering, nor for sacrifice,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: but to be a witness between us and you, and between our generations after us, that we might do service to Jehovah before him with our burnt-offerings, and with our sacrifices, and with our peace-offerings; that your children may not say to our children in future, Ye have no portion in Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And we said, If it shall be that in future they so say to us and to our generations, we will say, Behold the pattern of the altar of Jehovah which our fathers made, not for burnt-offering, nor for sacrifice, but as a witness between us and you.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Far be it from us that we should rebel against Jehovah, and turn this day from following Jehovah, in building an altar for burnt-offering, for oblation, and for sacrifice, besides the altar of Jehovah ourGod that is before his tabernacle.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And when Phinehas the priest and the princes of the assembly and the heads of the thousands of Israel that were with him heard the words that the children of Reuben and the children of Gad and the children of Manasseh spoke, it was good in their sight.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Phinehas the son of Eleazar the priest said unto the children of Reuben, and to the children of Gad, and to the children of Manasseh, This day we perceive that Jehovah is among us, because ye have not committed this trespass against Jehovah: now have ye delivered the children of Israel out of the hand of Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Phinehas the son of Eleazar the priest, and the princes, returned from the children of Reuben, and from the children of Gad, out of the land of Gilead, to the land of Canaan, to the children of Israel, and brought them word again.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the thing was good in the sight of the children of Israel, and the children of Israel blessedGod, and no more said that they would go up in warfare against them, to destroy the land in which the children of Reuben and the children of Gad dwelt.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the children of Reuben and the children of Gad gave a name to the altar; for it is a witness between us that Jehovah isGod.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And it came to pass a long time after that Jehovah had given rest to Israel from all their enemies round about, and Joshua had become old, advanced in age,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: that Joshua called for all Israel, for their elders, and for their heads, and for their judges, and for their officers, and said unto them, I am become old, advanced in age;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and ye have seen all that Jehovah yourGod hath done to all these nations because of you. For Jehovah yourGod is he that hath fought for you.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Behold, I have divided unto you by lot for an inheritance, according to your tribes, these nations that remain, from the Jordan, as well as all the nations that I have cut off, as far as the great sea toward the sun-setting.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Jehovah yourGod, he will expel them from before you, and dispossess them from out of your sight; and ye shall take possession of their land, as Jehovah yourGod hath said unto you.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And be ye very courageous to keep and to do all that is written in the book of the law of Moses, that ye turn not aside therefrom to the right hand or to the left;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: that ye enter not among these nations, these that remain among you; and ye shall make no mention of the name of theirgods, nor cause to swear [by them], neither serve them, nor bow yourselves unto them;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: but ye shall cleave unto Jehovah yourGod, as ye have done unto this day.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For Jehovah hath dispossessed from before you great and strong nations; and as to you, no man hath been able to stand before you unto this day.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: One man of you chaseth a thousand; for Jehovah yourGod, he it is that fighteth for you, as he hath said unto you.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Take great heed therefore unto your souls, that ye love Jehovah yourGod.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For if ye in any wise go back, and cleave unto the residue of these nations, these that remain among you, and make marriages with them, and come in unto them and they unto you:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: know for a certainty that Jehovah yourGod will no more dispossess these nations from before you, and they shall be snares and traps unto you, and scourges in your sides, and thorns in your eyes, until ye perish from off this good land which Jehovah yourGod hath given you.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And behold, I am going this day the way of all the earth; and ye know in all your heart, and in all your soul, that not one thing hath failed of all the good words that Jehovah yourGod hath spoken concerning you: all are come to pass unto you — not one thing hath failed thereof.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But it shall come to pass, that as every good word hath been fulfilled to you, that Jehovah yourGod spoke to you, so will Jehovah bring upon you every evil word, until he have destroyed you from off this good land which Jehovah yourGod hath given you;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: when ye transgress the covenant of Jehovah yourGod which he commanded you, and go and serve othergods, and bow yourselves unto them, so that the anger of Jehovah shall be kindled against you, and ye shall perish quickly from off the good land which he hath given unto you.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Joshua gathered all the tribes of Israel to Shechem, and called for the elders of Israel, and for their heads, and for their judges, and for their officers; and they presented themselves beforeGod.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Joshua said unto all the people, Thus saith Jehovah theGod of Israel: Your fathers dwelt of old on the other side of the river, Terah, the father of Abraham and the father of Nahor, and they served othergods.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And I took your father Abraham from the other side of the river, and led him throughout the land of Canaan, and multiplied his seed and gave him Isaac.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And I gave unto Isaac Jacob and Esau; and I gave unto Esau mount Seir, to possess it; and Jacob and his sons went down into Egypt.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And I sent Moses and Aaron, and I plagued Egypt, according to that which I did among them; and afterwards I brought you out.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And I brought your fathers out of Egypt, and ye came unto the sea; and the Egyptians pursued after your fathers with chariots and horsemen unto the Red sea.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Then they cried to Jehovah, and he put darkness between you and the Egyptians, and brought the sea upon them, and covered them; and your eyes saw what I did in Egypt; and ye dwelt in the wilderness a long time.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And I brought you into the land of the Amorites, who dwelt beyond the Jordan, and they fought with you, and I gave them into your hand, and ye took possession of their land, and I destroyed them from before you.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Balak the son of Zippor, king of Moab, arose and warred against Israel, and sent and called Balaam the son of Beor to curse you;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: but I would not hearken unto Balaam, and he blessed you expressly, and I delivered you out of his hand.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And ye went over the Jordan, and came unto Jericho, and the men of Jericho fought against you, the Amorites, and the Perizzites, and the Canaanites, and the Hittites, and the Girgashites, the Hivites, and the Jebusites; and I delivered them into your hand.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And I sent the hornet before you, which drove them out from before you, [as] the two kings of the Amorites; not with thy sword, nor with thy bow.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And I have given you a land for which ye did not labour, and cities which ye built not, and ye dwell in them; of vineyards and oliveyards which ye planted not do ye eat.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And now fear Jehovah and serve him in perfectness and in truth; and put away thegods which your fathers served on the other side of the river, and in Egypt; and serve Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And if it seem evil unto you to serve Jehovah, choose you this day whom ye will serve; whether thegods whom your fathers that were on the other side of the river served, or thegods of the Amorite, in whose land ye dwell; but as for me and my house, we will serve Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the people answered and said, Far be it from us that we should forsake Jehovah, to serve othergods;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: for Jehovah ourGod, he it is that brought us up and our fathers out of the land of Egypt, from the house of bondage, and who did those great signs before our eyes, and preserved us in all the way wherein we went, and among all the peoples through whom we passed!

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Jehovah drove out from before us all the peoples, and the Amorites the inhabitants of the land: so therefore we will serve Jehovah, for he is ourGod.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Joshua said to the people, Ye cannot serve Jehovah, for he is a holyGod; he is a jealousGod; he will not forgive your transgressions nor your sins.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: If ye forsake Jehovah, and serve strangegods, then he will turn and do you hurt, and consume you, after that he hath done you good.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the people said to Joshua, No; but we will serve Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Joshua said unto the people, Ye are witnesses against yourselves that ye have chosen you Jehovah, to serve him. And they said, [We are] witnesses.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Now therefore put away the strangegods that are among you, and incline your heart unto Jehovah theGod of Israel.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the people said unto Joshua, Jehovah ourGod will we serve, and to his voice will we hearken.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: So Joshua made a covenant with the people that day, and set them a statute and an ordinance in Shechem.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Joshua wrote these words in the book of the law ofGod, and took a great stone, and set it up there under the oak that was by the sanctuary of Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Joshua said unto all the people, Behold, this stone shall be a witness unto us, for it hath heard all the words of Jehovah which he spoke unto us; and it shall be a witness against you, lest ye deny yourGod.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Joshua dismissed the people, every man to his inheritance.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And it came to pass after these things, that Joshua the son of Nun, the servant of Jehovah, died, a hundred and ten years old.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they buried him in the border of his inheritance in Timnath-serah, which is in mount Ephraim, on the north side of the mountain of Gaash.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Israel served Jehovah all the days of Joshua, and all the days of the elders whose days were prolonged after Joshua, and who had known all the works of Jehovah, which he had done for Israel.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the bones of Joseph, which the children of Israel had brought up out of Egypt, buried they in Shechem in the portion of the field which Jacob had bought of the sons of Hamor, Shechem's father, for a hundred kesitahs; and it became the inheritance of the children of Joseph.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Eleazar the son of Aaron died; and they buried him in the hill of Phinehas his son, which had been given him in mount Ephraim.
